mobile: user can close the image suggestion UI

Shows the Revise Tone Edit Check and tags edits

Closes the Editor when declining Edits and suggests a new task
Shows the Revise Tone Edit Check and tags edits

Template-based tasks: saves change tags for unstructured task edits made via VisualEditor
